form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Minecraft Fusion at this track last start over 400m (22.90). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Strong performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a nose in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a fast 22.85 over the 400m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (23.04) beating Stock's Gift in a Grade 5 on March 27. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Scored by a nose last time (17.55) in a Grade 4/5 over 300m at Taree Super Track. Has one success and three minors from eight starts from box 5. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Scored by a nose last time (17.55) in a Grade 4/5 over 300m at Taree Super Track. Has one success and three minors from eight starts from box 5. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished last in a Grade 3/4 on March 28 over 400m at this track behind My Cupcake beaten 7 lengths (23.49). Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.02) when fourth over 400m at this track in a Free For All. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from nine starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 1.5 lengths winner (22.97) over 400m at this track. Holds top-three claims.
